author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. gpu_bmm_f16 — batched matmul with f16 Tensor Cores via cublasGemmStridedBatchedEx. Converts f32 inputs to f16 on-device, accumulates in f32. Wired into bmm() autocast dispatch.
2. GpuBackend::bmm_f16_f32() trait method + CudaBackendImpl wiring
3. f32→bf16 PTX conversion kernel using bit manipulation (round-to-nearest-even via integer ops, works on sm_52+)
4. gpu_matmul_bf16 — matrix multiply with bf16 Tensor Cores via cublasGemmEx with CUDA_R_16BF
5. gpu_f32_to_bf16 kernel function with CPU fallback stub
6. BMM now auto-dispatches to f16 Tensor Core path when autocast selects ReducedPrecision
7. All 807 core + 250 optim + 193 gpu tests pass
